2c:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"BEAM Architecture Overview"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"BEAM (Biological-inspired Episodic-Associative Memory) is the core architecture powering Mnemosyne. It models human memory organization with three tiers plus TripleStore, each optimized for different retention and retrieval patterns."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"The Three Memory Tiers + TripleStore"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\n\ngraph TB\n  subgraph Input[\"Agent Input\"]\n      I1[Observation]\n      I2[Conversation]\n      I3[Tool Result]\n  end\n\n  subgraph BEAM[\"BEAM Memory System\"]\n      WM[Working Memory\n      Short-term, up to 10K entries\n      <100ms access]\n      EM[Episodic Memory\n      Long-term experiences\n      Hybrid retrieval]\n      SP[Scratchpad\n      Temporary workspace\n      Up to 1K entries]\n  end\n\n  I1 -->|remember| WM\n  I2 -->|remember| WM\n  I3 -->|remember| WM\n  WM -->|sleep consolidation| EM\n  EM -->|recall| Agent\n\n  style WM fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7\n  style EM fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706\n  style SP fill:#faf5ff,stroke:#9333ea\n\n"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Working Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The agent's immediate context window. Holds recent observations, conversation history, and active tool results. Fastest access (<100ms), limited capacity (up to 10,000 entries), and entries are marked as consolidated via sleep consolidation rather than deleted."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency"}],": Sub-100ms median"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity"}],": Up to 10,000 entries (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS"}],", default 10,000)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"TTL"}],": 24 hours (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_TTL_HOURS"}],", default 24)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Persistence"}],": Survives process restarts via SQLite"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Episodic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Long-term storage for experiences, conversations, and events. Organized chronologically with rich metadata. Uses hybrid retrieval combining vector similarity and full-text search."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retention"}],": Permanent (until explicit deletion)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retrieval"}],": Hybrid (vector + FTS5) with ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"configurable scoring weights"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}],", defaulting to 50/30/20)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal decay"}],": Tunable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}]," parameters on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Consolidation"}],": Promoted from Working Memory via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"TripleStore (Knowledge Graph)"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Structured knowledge stored as subject-predicate-object triples. Managed by the separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class (not part of the main ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," class)."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Format"}],": Subject-predicate-object triples with confidence and validity timestamps"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Query"}],": Filter by subject, predicate, or object via ","$L4"]}],"\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n"]}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27"],["$L28"],"$L29"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"avR8AX1ZmJ678HIyJzpPX"}
4:["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore.query()"}]
5:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Access"}],": Separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"TripleStore"}]," class or module-level ",["$","code",null,{"children":"add_triple()"}]," / ",["$","code",null,{"children":"query_triples()"}]," helpers"]}]
6:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Schema"}],": Flexible, no predefined ontology"]}]
7:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Scratchpad"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":"A temporary workspace for reasoning, planning, and intermediate computations. Analogous to human working memory's manipulation buffer."}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}]
a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity"}],": Up to 1,000 entries (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SP_MAX"}],", default 1,000)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Use case"}],": Chain-of-thought, planning, scratch calculations"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"API"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_write()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_read()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_clear()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Lifetime"}],": Session-bound"]}],"\n"]}]
b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Data Flow"}]
c:["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\n\nsequenceDiagram\n  participant Agent\n  participant WM as Working Memory\n  participant SP as Scratchpad\n  participant EM as Episodic Memory\n  participant SM as TripleStore (Knowledge Graph)\n\n  Agent->>WM: remember(content)\n  WM->>WM: store + index\n  Agent->>SP: scratchpad_write(thought)\n  SP->>SP: store\n  Agent->>EM: recall(query)\n  EM->>Agent: return results\n  Agent->>SM: add_triple(s, p, o)\n  SM->>SM: store triple\n  Agent->>SM: query_triples(s, p, o)\n  SM->>Agent: return triples\n\n"}]
d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Sleep Consolidation"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["Call ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," to run a consolidation cycle that:"]}]
f:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Select"}]," Working Memory entries older than TTL/2 (12 hours by default)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Group"}]," candidates by source"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Summarize"}]," each group via LLM or AAAK text substitution"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}]," summaries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mark"}]," the original Working Memory entries as consolidated (sets ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidated_at"}],")"]}],"\n"]}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep is triggered explicitly — it does not run automatically on a timer."}]
11:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"MEMORIA (v3.0+)"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"MEMORIA is a structured fact extraction and retrieval layer added in v3.0. It builds five new SQLite tables alongside the standard memory tiers:"}]
13:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Table"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it stores"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Key columns"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_facts"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Key-value facts (metrics, dates, versions)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"key, value, fact_type, version_id"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_timelines"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Chronological event index"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"date, description, session_id"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_kg"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Subject-predicate-object triples"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"subject, predicate, object"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_instructions"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Extracted user instructions"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"instruction, topic, context_snippet, source_memory_id"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"memoria_preferences"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"User preference statements"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"preference, topic, evolution, context_snippet, source_memory_id"}]]}]]}]]}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":["During ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}],", MEMORIA regex-mining extracts structured data from content and stores it in these tables. Retrieval routes queries by ability type (IE: fact lookups, TR: timeline searches, CR: negation queries, etc.)."]}]
15:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"V3 Features"}]
16:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Entity Extraction"}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," accepts ",["$","code",null,{"children":"extract_entities=True"}]," to automatically detect named entities (mentions, hashtags, proper nouns) using regex patterns and Levenshtein fuzzy matching. Extracted entities are stored as AnnotationStore annotations."]}]
18:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Fact Extraction"}]
19:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}]," accepts ",["$","code",null,{"children":"extract=True"}]," to send content through an LLM pipeline that extracts 2–5 structured factual statements, stored as AnnotationStore annotations. The extraction pipeline gracefully falls back through remote API → local GGUF → skip."]}]
1a:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Temporal Recall"}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," now supports ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"query_time"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}]," parameters for fine-grained control over how recency influences retrieval. Point-in-time queries allow retrieving memories as they existed at a specific timestamp."]}]
1c:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Configurable Scoring"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":["The hybrid scoring weights (",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}],") are now configurable per-query instead of fixed at compile time. Default: 50/30/20."]}]
1e:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Memory Banks"}]
1f:["$","p",null,{"children":["Named banks provide isolated SQLite databases per project or context. Create via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne(bank=\"project-a\")"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne mcp --bank project-a"}],"."]}]
20:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Streaming & Patterns"}]
21:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]," provides push/pull event patterns for real-time notifications. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"PatternDetector"}]," discovers temporal, content, and sequence patterns across stored memories. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]," enables incremental synchronization between instances."]}]
22:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Plugin System"}]
23:["$","p",null,{"children":["A plugin base class (",["$","code",null,{"children":"MnemosynePlugin"}],") with 4 lifecycle hooks. Built-in plugins: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"LoggingPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MetricsPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"FilterPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"CompressionPlugin"}],". Discovers plugins from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/plugins/"}],"."]}]
24:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Design Philosophy"}]
25:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's architecture prioritizes:"}]
26:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Locality"}],": All data in SQLite — no network calls for retrieval"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transparency"}],": Every operation is inspectable and debuggable"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Efficiency"}],": Sub-100ms retrieval for typical workloads"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Flexibility"}],": Works standalone or as a Hermes plugin"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Privacy"}],": No data leaves your machine by default"]}],"\n"]}]
27:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L2a",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Comparison with Vector-Only Stores"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Unlike pure vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate), Mnemosyne combines dense embeddings with structured storage, full-text search, and temporal relationships. This hybrid approach delivers more precise retrieval for agent use cases where exact facts matter as much as semantic similarity."}]}]]}]]}]}]
28:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01o_465-h6ryu.js","async":true}]
29:["$","$L2b",null,{"children":["$","$2c",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@2d"}]}]
